summary: Added Stage 3C project task seeding with deterministic task seed records, project-seed-tasks dry-run/apply CLI behavior, seed-safe status validation, focused tests, and durable planning/handoff evidence.

tests_run.command: uv run --no-sync python -B -m pytest tests/test_projects.py -q -p no:cacheprovider
tests_run.summary: 14 passed; covered project registry facts, candidate tasks, task seed conversion, dry-run output, apply/idempotency, missing roots, candidate-free projects, and rejection of worker lifecycle statuses during task seeding.
Planning integrity checks passed with the Stage 3C task claimed for implementation.
Story Loop status reported queue_state=running for the claimed Stage 3C task before completion.
File justification checks passed after registering the new Stage 3C worker-result evidence.
Public repo hygiene checks passed with the Stage 3C public candidate files.
388 passed plus Ruff, format, mypy, CLI smoke checks, file justification, public hygiene, planning integrity, skill inventory, source inventory, protected locks, and uv lock --check.

ProjectTaskSeed records deterministicall.evidence: build_project_task_seeds returns ProjectTaskSeed records with deterministic task_id values, plan_id, task contract fields, source_project/source_candidate scope metadata, worker backend, and review_required; focused tests assert the mapping.

project-seed-tasks supports dry-run JSON.evidence: project-seed-tasks emits dry-run JSON without opening planning SQLite and uses SupervisorTaskRecord/upsert_supervisor_task only when --apply is present; tests assert target TASKS.json remains unchanged.

Seeding is idempotent for the same proje.evidence: The apply test runs project-seed-tasks twice and confirms one stable supervisor task row; missing and candidate-free roots return nonzero actionable output.

Focused tests cover seed conversion, dry.evidence: tests/test_projects.py now contains fourteen focused tests covering the named Stage 3C behavior plus existing project-list behavior.

Planning SQLite and HANDOFF.md record th.evidence: plans/planning.sqlite3 records the Stage 3C task shape and worker run, and HANDOFF.md records the shaped and completed Stage 3C evidence, checks, risks, and next action.

review.summary: Fresh-thread-style local review found and fixed one actionable issue: project-seed-tasks now rejects worker lifecycle and terminal statuses so seeding cannot create running/reviewing/completed rows without worker-run evidence. The apply path mutates only supervisor planning SQLite through typed helpers and preserves target project files.

risks: Stage 3 is not fully complete: named specialized adapters remain future slices.
Seeded tasks default to pending so later task compiler/refinement can decide AFK readiness before execution.
Live Codex Exec launch remains unavailable in this Windows shell because the resolved WindowsApps codex.exe path returns Access is denied.
follow_up_tasks: Shape and implement named specialized project adapters for planning SQLite, markdown plans, harness configs, and insights graphs.
Consider duplicate candidate ID diagnostics when specialized adapters start emitting richer task sets.
handoff_notes: Stage 3C adds the first task seeding path from adapter output into supervisor planning SQLite. Continue Stage 3 with named specialized adapters before Stage 11 MCP.
